heading: Define the Index for the dateFacet Type
body:
In your terminal, connect to your Atlas cloud-hosted
deployment or local deployment from [mongosh](mongodb-shell). For detailed
instructions on how to connect, see
[Connect to a Deployment](mongodb-shell/connect).

**Input:**

```shell
 use <database>
```

**Output:**

```shell
switched to db <database>
```

**Input:**

```shell
db.<collection>.createSearchIndex(
  "default",
    {
      "mappings": {
        "dynamic": true|false,
        "fields": {
        "<field-name>": {
          "type": "autocomplete",
          "analyzer": "<lucene-analyzer>",
          "tokenization": "edgeGram|rightEdgeGram|nGram",
          "minGrams": <2>,
          "maxGrams": <15>,
          "foldDiacritics": true|false,
          "similarity": { "type": "bm25|boolean|stableTfl" }
        }
      }
    }
  }
)
```

**Output:**

```
default
```
